_comment: 1Password -> GitHub Environment secrets, synced by .github/workflows/sync-github-secrets.yml via the framework's supa-sync-1password-to-github. Only GitHub-Actions-consumed secrets belong here (things a workflow reads at deploy time), NOT Convex deployment env vars — those go to Convex via sync-secrets.yml. Each name maps to op://Events/<NAME>/<environment>. NEVER add the two bootstrap secrets that authorize this sync: OP_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_TOKEN (reads 1Password) and GH_ADMIN_TOKEN (writes GitHub secrets) — they are set by hand, once. 'required' aborts the whole run if 1Password can't return a value (never a partial/pruned write); 'optional' would be pruned when absent, so only use it for genuinely-removable keys.
